visa_types.forms:
Applicants, who wish to obtain a Lebanon visa application form, can download the requisite form here.
Please note the instructions mentioned below while taking the printout. 
Download Visa Applications Forms
- Visa Application Form
Please Note:
You can also obtain this form from the visa application centre.
It is mandatory to be filled by all applicants ..

- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR

- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
Tourist Visa is given to those visiting Lebanon for tourism or other non-business related purposes.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Tourist Visa is given to those visiting Lebanon for tourism or other non-business related purposes.

## Visa Fees

[Table:Tourist]
Service charge:

[Table:Tourist]
Mandatory 2 way courier – 2554/- per application

## Documents Required
For documents to be submitted by all applicants Click here
Please make a note that submission of incomplete documentation may result in the rejection of your application, Kindly submit your application to VFS Office along with the required documents as mentioned in the checklist for your desired Visa Category

## Photo Specifications

[Table:Tourist]

[Table:Tourist]

[Table:Tourist]

[Table:Tourist]

## Processing Time

                                                                        Decisions about Lebanon visa applications must normally be made within 15 days. In some cases applications will require further enquiry. In these cases, the maximum processing time is 30 days. In exceptionally difficult cases the processing time can be
                                                                        up to 60 days.

## Download Forms
Applicants, who wish to obtain a Lebanon visa application form, can download the requisite form here.
Please note the instructions mentioned below while taking the printout. 
Download Visa Applications Forms
- Visa Application Form
Please Note:
You can also obtain this form from the visa application centre.
It is mandatory to be filled by all applicants ..
To download the Application Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

Overview
A Business Visa is given those who are doing business in Lebanon such as making sales or establishing contacts on behalf of a company outside Bhutan

visa_types.name: Student
visa_types.documents_required:
Documents to be submitted with a visa application form - Click Here
- For all visa category additional set of documents are required .
Note - Please be informed that in case applicant is having travel history in old passports than that needs to be submit along with the applications.
Documents to be submitted with a visa application form
- Visa application form to be filled properly as per Embassy instructions.
- Color Photocopy of the passport of the applicant with the validity of minimum 6 months at the time of submission of the application.
- Two latest clear photographs of the applicant.
- Admission letter for study issued by the university, school or institution recognized by the Lebanese Govt. or invitation letter from either institutions must be in Arabic, addressed to the Embassy
- Prior Air ticket booking for arrival and departure.
- Financial records proving that the applicant can sustain his living in Lebanon.
- The applicant who has a scholarship, may be exempted from submitting the admission letter or financial records to pursue study, but he / she has to attach the admission letter with scholarship.
Please make a note that submission of incomplete documentation may result in the rejection of your application, Kindly submit your application to VFS Office along with the required documents as mentioned in the checklist for your desired Visa Category”

visa_types.overview:
Overview
This Visa is granted for those who want to do an internship in Lebanon
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This Visa is granted for those who want to do an internship in Lebanon

## Visa Fees

[Table:Student]
Service charge:

[Table:Student]
Mandatory 2 way courier – 2554/- per application

## Documents Required
Documents to be submitted with a visa application form - Click Here
- For all visa category additional set of documents are required .
Note - Please be informed that in case applicant is having travel history in old passports than that needs to be submit along with the applications.
Documents to be submitted with a visa application form
- Visa application form to be filled properly as per Embassy instructions.
- Color Photocopy of the passport of the applicant with the validity of minimum 6 months at the time of submission of the application.
- Two latest clear photographs of the applicant.
- Admission letter for study issued by the university, school or institution recognized by the Lebanese Govt. or invitation letter from either institutions must be in Arabic, addressed to the Embassy
- Prior Air ticket booking for arrival and departure.
- Financial records proving that the applicant can sustain his living in Lebanon.
- The applicant who has a scholarship, may be exempted from submitting the admission letter or financial records to pursue study, but he / she has to attach the admission letter with scholarship.
Please make a note that submission of incomplete documentation may result in the rejection of your application, Kindly submit your application to VFS Office along with the required documents as mentioned in the checklist for your desired Visa Category”

visa_types.name: Transit
visa_types.documents_required:
Documents to be submitted with a visa application form - Click Here
- For all visa category additional set of documents are required .
Note - Please be informed that in case applicant is having travel history in old passports than that needs to be submit along with the applications.
Transit Visa:
- Visa application form to be filled properly as per Embassy instructions.
- Color Photocopy of the passport of the applicant with the validity of minimum 6 months at the time of submission of the application.
- Two latest clear photographs of the applicant.
- Latest ‘Bank Statement’ of at least 3 months having the amount of 5 Lac minimum or proof of sufficient financial records to bear the expenditures of stay .
- Covering letter (one’s complete introduction with the reason of transit.)
- Visa of the country where the applicant is going to travel or the ‘residential permit card of that country is required.
- Air ticket for the country where the travel is to be desired.
Please make a note that submission of incomplete documentation may result in the rejection of your application, Kindly submit your application to VFS Office along with the required documents as mentioned in the checklist for your desired Visa Category”

visa_types.overview:
Overview

                                                                        Airport Transit Visa application is applicable in case you have to change flights without leaving the airport. An airport transit visa entitles the holder to enter the international transit area of the airport, but not the territory of the Lebanon
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview

                                                                        Airport Transit Visa application is applicable in case you have to change flights without leaving the airport. An airport transit visa entitles the holder to enter the international transit area of the airport, but not the territory of the Lebanon

## Visa Fees

[Table:Transit]
Service charge:

[Table:Transit]
Mandatory 2 way courier – 2554/- per application

## Documents Required
Documents to be submitted with a visa application form - Click Here
- For all visa category additional set of documents are required .
Note - Please be informed that in case applicant is having travel history in old passports than that needs to be submit along with the applications.
Transit Visa:
- Visa application form to be filled properly as per Embassy instructions.
- Color Photocopy of the passport of the applicant with the validity of minimum 6 months at the time of submission of the application.
- Two latest clear photographs of the applicant.
- Latest ‘Bank Statement’ of at least 3 months having the amount of 5 Lac minimum or proof of sufficient financial records to bear the expenditures of stay .
- Covering letter (one’s complete introduction with the reason of transit.)
- Visa of the country where the applicant is going to travel or the ‘residential permit card of that country is required.
- Air ticket for the country where the travel is to be desired.
Please make a note that submission of incomplete documentation may result in the rejection of your application, Kindly submit your application to VFS Office along with the required documents as mentioned in the checklist for your desired Visa Category”

## Photo Specifications

[Table:Transit]

[Table:Transit]

[Table:Transit]

[Table:Transit]

## Processing Time
Decisions about Lebanon visa applications must normally be made within 15 days. In some cases applications will require further enquiry. In these cases, the maximum processing time is
                                                                        30 days. In exceptionally difficult cases the processing time can be up to 60 days.
                                                                    

## Download Forms
